title: Time Block
description: Represents a time block recording worked hours for a worker within the Workday Time Tracking system.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the time block

descriptor.description: The display name of the time block

worker.description: The worker who recorded the time

date.description: The date of the time block

startTime.description: The start time of the time block

endTime.description: The end time of the time block

totalHours.description: The total hours recorded in the time block

timeCode.description: The time code classification (Regular, Overtime, etc.)

timeZone.description: The time zone for the time block

comment.description: Optional comment for the time block
